---
name: 💡 Feature Request
about: 提出新功能建议 / Suggest a new feature
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## 功能描述 / Feature Description

清晰描述你希望添加的功能 / Clearly describe the feature you want

## 动机 / Motivation

为什么需要这个功能？它解决了什么问题？ / Why do you need this feature? What problem does it solve?

## 建议方案 / Proposed Solution

你希望这个功能如何工作？ / How would you like this feature to work?

## 替代方案 / Alternatives Considered

是否考虑过其他实现方式？ / Have you considered any alternatives?

## 额外信息 / Additional Context

截图、参考项目、或任何有助于理解需求的信息 / Screenshots, reference projects, or any context that helps explain the request
